data.title: Lamborghini Urus v RS7 Performance DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: lamborghini urus v rs7 performance drag race _ transcript what will happen in a drag race between a lamborghini urus and my very own audi rs7 performance? well, we ' re going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m matt watson and you ' re watching car wow. the lamborghini rsq8 has a 4 l twinturbo v8 that puts out 650 horsepower and 850 new m of torque. it sends power to all four wheels via an 8 - speed torque converter automatic gearbox, and the car weighs in at 2. 2 tons. when it was new, the car cost £175, 000. the audi rs7 performance uses the same engine as the lamborghini, but here it ' s tuned to 630 horsepower and 850 new m of torque. it has the same 8 - speed torque converter, automatic gearbox, and all - wheel drive and weighs in at 2, 65 kg. the rs7 performance costs from 130, 000. all right, sam. now, this may seem a little bit odd, me letting you drive my car and i ' m in an urus. in fact, this is all about face. i should be in that car and yanni should be in this and yet here we are. yeah, but when you race an audi against an audi, you know, only exciting things can happen. exactly. i ' m glad we ' re seeing it from the same him sheet. this is an audi with some italian bits stuck onto it. anyway, the reason i ' m not in my car is because i want it to be fair. i want it to be impartial this drag race. we want to see what this lamborghini can do. the interesting thing about the lamborghini is that there ' s many a time when yan has raced his that he always complains about it bogging down on the launch. why is it bogged down? so, it ' s going to be interesting to see how this one particularly performs. that car puts in low 11s. i ' m not entirely sure which way this is going to go. one thing we do know is audi will win. now, shall we do a little sound check to see which audi sounds the best? i can rev mine all the way up. there ' s no soft limiter because lamborghini. i ' m feeling quite soft. yeah, typical audi soft limit

paragraphs.context: at responding to the lie. can we just do it again? this can ' t be right. i ' m worried about this car. can we just let ' s just do one more time. if there ' s a chance i can watch that happen again. yes, absolutely. let ' s do it again. did he break early or something? no, i was bang on the line. are you in comfort mode? make sure you ' re not in corser mode cuz it is qu bouncy in that braking zone. yeah, i was in corser mode. so, let me just go into strada. so, maybe the suspension will do a better job of like soaking up the bumps. yeah, cuz he was skipping a bit, but it ' s really scary. there ' s a very tiny profile on those tires. is that another negative about like oversized like rims and stuff like that? the bigger the rim, the lower the profile, cuz otherwise it won ' t fit in the arch, will it? with that size rim, you ' re going to have a very small profile and therefore a lot of the suspension ' s gone. move your seat closer for some more power into the [ applause ] i ' ve literally like that wasn ' t quite so bad, was it? but still not great. it was bouncing a lot less. so, we ' ve learned from that that if this was on the proper size tires, it would probably stopped in a shorter distance still. essentially, it would have skipped a little bit less in the braking. so, less abs, more traction, more grip, more stoppage. yeah, correct. cuz remember all the weight has gone forward in the braking zone. so the back of that car was fundamentally in the air. so every time it bounces it ' s in the air, not breaking. big wheels might look good. big wheels aren ' t always a great idea in terms of performance and braking. lessons learned. anyhow, i hope you ' ll enjoyed the video. if you did, give it a like. click on the video windows to watch more videos. and if you click on the car logo, you can check out the carow drag race leaderboard to see how these cars qual times compare to everything else we ' ve ever drag raced. thanks for watching.
